name: impidimp
flavor_texts: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy.
It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.
text: Impidimp is the Wily Pokémon. It is a dark and fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: prankster, frisk, pickpocket (hidden). Base stats — HP: 45, Attack: 45, Defense: 30, Sp. Atk: 55, Sp. Def: 40, Speed: 50. Evolution line: impidimp → morgrem → grimmsnarl. Lore: Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy. It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants.
